3262490.name: PolyWar
3262490.description: PolyWar is a free online FPS-based PvP game. Launch the game, create a server, or join servers created by others to jump straight into the fun. You can play with up to 4 friends. For now, in this game where you can only play PvP with your friends, players try to get the most kills within 5 minutes, and the player with the most kills becomes the winner of the round. With its low-requirement graphics, you will enjoy a sweet yet action-packed gaming experience – and it's completely free!
